prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-AOCSK-BUN-30PC-8X5-ASSRTD-BNDL Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Camping Survival Safety and Emergency Preparedness Kit, 12pc Description: There are a lot of survival kits on the market and they are mixed with every variety of survival gear; some are useful and some are useless.

This Essential Wilderness Kit is our spin on the survival kit based on our most popular outdoor products and our customers' reviews.

We have included some crucial quality items such as a 7" full tang survival knife with magnesium fire starter. Other key items include an emergency blanket, floating whistle and multi tool.

Additionally you'll find a McNett Outgo Microfiber towel. This towel will hold up to 7 times its weight in water, and measures 20" x 40". The towel has endless uses, and everything fits neatly inside a mesh carry pouch.

Make sure to keep one of these in your bug out back, camping gear or car in case of an emergency. Search Terms: hiking gear backpacking accesories camping supplies emergency survival kit Features: - McNett Outgo Microfiber Towel; 20" x 40"; Holds 7X Its Weight in Water - 7" Full Tang Hunting Knife; Magnesium Fire Starter; Nylon Sheath - High Visibility Orange Floating Whistle - Multipurpose Safety Pins; 11 Function Credit Card Multi Tool === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Camping Survival Safety Emergency Preparedness Kit

tokens.name: Camping Survival Safety Emergency Preparedness Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 7 Inch Full Tang Knife, Magnesium Fire Starter, Microfiber Towel, Whistle, Multi Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Full Tang Knife And Fire Starter, Emergency Blanket, Floating Whistle, Multitool, Microfiber Towel
